title: Me Nokta Ali
overview: Me Nokta Ali is an unlucky, ill-fated young man who works at the population registry office. Due to a clerical error in his birth certificate, he starts life at a disadvantage. He is impulsive, blurting out whatever comes to mind without thinking. After his grandfather's death, Me Nokta Ali moves to the city to work at a hospital. Not only does he cause chaos at the hospital, but he also falls in love.
